svg.text: I build things for the web. Focused on clean code, thoughtful UX,
A shadcn/ui component library port for Streamlit — bringing modern UI primitives to Python dashboards.
A minimal, distraction-free writing and notes app with a clean interface.
Collection of ML notebooks — NLP, computer vision, and data exploration projects.
Building production software, contributing to open source
Contributed to Python and JS ecosystem packages
Client projects — web apps, dashboards, automation
First lines of Python, competitive programming, building small tools
Interested in full-time roles, freelance projects,
or interesting collabs. Let's build something.
